summary: Comprehensive testing of Margdarshak AI app completed. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Login screen loads correctly with all branding elements. All critical API endpoints working including auth, daily-tip, preferences, ask (AI), conversations, and VR-RAG databases.

minor.issue: Most scripture PDFs extracted 0 chars (only Bhagavad Gita extracted 11474 chars → 3 chunks). Vedas, Puranas, Upanishads PDFs appear to be empty or unreadable.

issues: Deprecation warning: shadow* style props deprecated, should use boxShadow

Package version mismatches: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 (expected 2.2.0), expo-linear-gradient@55.0.13 (expected ~15.0.8), expo-linking@55.0.13 (expected ~8.0.11), expo-speech@55.0.13 (expected ~14.0.8), expo-web-browser@55.0.14 (expected ~15.0.10)

react_native_issues.issue: useNativeDriver not supported warning (expected in web preview, not critical)

action_items: Investigate VR-RAG PDF extraction issue - most PDFs returning 0 chars
Consider updating package versions to match Expo SDK expectations (non-critical)
Replace shadow* style props with boxShadow for React Native Web compatibility (non-critical)
Test full user flow: dev-login → onboarding → chat → AI response with VR-RAG
critical_code_review_comments: File Size: /app/frontend/app/index.tsx is 1012 lines - should be split into smaller components (LoginScreen, ChatApp, VideosRow, etc.)
MongoDB ObjectId: Backend correctly excludes _id from responses using {"_id": 0} in queries
Environment Variables: All URLs correctly use environment variables (EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, MONGO_URL)
Auth Implementation: Proper session token handling with cookie + Authorization header fallback
Error Handling: Backend has proper guardrails for input/output validation
VR-RAG Integration: Warm cache on startup working, but PDF extraction needs investigation
seed_data_creation: Test user created via dev-login: test_{timestamp}@test.com. Conversation created via /api/ask endpoint during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully functional. Frontend login screen working. Need to test: (1) Full onboarding flow after login, (2) Main chat interface with AI responses, (3) VR-RAG scripture retrieval in AI responses, (4) YouTube video integration, (5) Conversation history. VR-RAG PDF extraction issue needs investigation - only 1 out of 13 PDFs extracting text.
rca_of_issue: VR-RAG PDF Extraction: Most scripture PDFs (Vedas, Puranas, Upanishads) are extracting 0 characters. Only Bhagavad Gita PDF extracted 11474 chars → 3 chunks. This suggests either: (1) PDFs are scanned images without OCR, (2) PDFs are encrypted/protected, (3) PDF parsing library (PyPDF2/pdfplumber) cannot read the format. Mitigation: Check PDF files manually, consider using OCR (pytesseract) for image-based PDFs, or source text-based PDFs.
